title: ÜSMERA (Medical Radiation Application and Research Center) Director's Message
content:
ÜSMERA (Medical Radiation Application and Research Center) Director's Message

Dear Scientists,

In today's world where scientific studies are advancing rapidly, the opportunities offered by science and technology point to an infinite potential. The use of radiation in a wide range of fields and developing technologies increase the importance of scientific studies in this field. From the medical field to materials science, from environmental studies to industrial research, the effect of radiation, combined with new discoveries and advanced techniques, creates important research areas.

The Medical Radiation Research and Application Center (ÜSMERA), operating under the roof of Üsküdar University, aims to accompany the scientific journey of our country. This center aims to be a platform that will enable the training of future scientists, where academicians who are experts in their fields will come together and sign important projects.

It aims to break new ground in the scientific field with experimental and theoretical studies, innovative approaches and R&D-based projects to be carried out under the roof of ÜSMERA. We believe that our comprehensive plans, from educational activities to sectoral collaborations, from project-oriented studies to the formation of joint research groups, will make valuable contributions to the scientific discoveries of humanity.

Sincerely yours.

Assoc. Prof. Dr. Feride KULALI ÖZDEK
